zh.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg是Gerard van Sterkenburg的女兒，於大約1255年出生在荷蘭霍蘭可盧姆。她和Jan Herbaren II van Arkel至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1317年在荷蘭-拉藍德莫倫藍登阿可爾享年63歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg是Gerard van Sterkenburg的女儿，于大约1255年出生在荷兰霍蘭可盧姆。她和Jan Herbaren II van Arkel至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1317年在荷兰-拉藍德莫倫藍登阿可爾享年63岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg was born about 1255, in Heukelum, Holland, Netherlands as the daughter of Gerard van Sterkenburg. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Jan Herbaren II van Arkel. She died in 1317, in Arkel, Molenlanden, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 63, and was buried in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg est née environ 1255, à Heukelum, Holland, Pays-Bas, fille de Gerard van Sterkenburg. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Jan Herbaren II van Arkel. Elle est décédée en 1317, à Arkel, Molenlanden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg wurde um 1255 in Heukelum, Holland, Niederlande, als Tochter von Gerard van Sterkenburg geboren. Sie hatte mit Jan Herbaren II van Arkel mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1317 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Arkel, Molenlanden, Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg è nata il circa 1255 nel Heukelum, Holland, Paesi Bassi come figlia di Gerard van Sterkenburg. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Jan Herbaren II van Arkel. Morì nel 1317, nel Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburgは約1255年にオランダホーランドヘウケルムでGerard van Sterkenburgの娘として生まれた。彼女はJan Herbaren II van Arkelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1317年にオランダズイド-hオランドモレンランデンアルケルで63歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg(은)는 대략 1255년 네덜란드 홀랜드 헤우켈럼에서 Gerard van Sterkenburg의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Jan Herbaren II van Arkel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 모렌랜든 아클에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에 묻혔다.

pt.Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Nederland: Sint Pancras, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Heukelum, Holland, Países Baixos filha de Gerard van Sterkenburg. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Jan Herbaren II van Arkel. Ela faleceu em 1317, em Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ro.Arkel, , South Holland, Netherlands: Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg родилась около 1255 г. в местности хеукелум, холланд, Нидерланды. Её отца звали Gerard van Sterkenburg. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Jan Herbaren II van Arkel. Она умерла в 1317 г. в местности аркел, моленланден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg nació aproximadamente 1255, en Heukelum, Holland, Países Bajos como hija de Gerard van Sterkenburg. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Jan Herbaren II van Arkel. Murió en 1317, en Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
